architect.name: THE ARCHITECT
architect.lore: Builds systems. Thinks in structures. Never improvises.

ascetic.name: THE ASCETIC
ascetic.lore: Forges the will through suffering. Pain is the teacher.

linguist.name: THE LINGUIST
linguist.lore: Languages are keys. Every key opens a different mind.

warlord.name: THE WARLORD
warlord.lore: The body is the weapon. Discipline is the ammunition.

blueprint.name: BLUEPRINT
blueprint.desc: Next 3 tasks logged give +50% Rank XP until midnight.

system_overload.name: SYSTEM OVERLOAD
system_overload.desc: Deal 3× damage to current boss on next task completion.

infinite_loop.name: INFINITE LOOP
infinite_loop.desc: All sessions in next 2 hours count double for cognitive metrics.

iron_fast.name: IRON FAST
iron_fast.desc: For 24h: each task restores 5 HP. Missed dailies deal 0 HP damage.

contemplate.name: CONTEMPLATE
contemplate.desc: Instantly gain +3 to all Gf/Gc/Ps/Vm as if a 1h perfect session.

transcendence.name: TRANSCENDENCE
transcendence.desc: For 48h: streak cannot break. Rival XP frozen.

babel_mode.name: BABEL MODE
babel_mode.desc: Next language session counts across all three language subjects.

polyglot_surge.name: POLYGLOT SURGE
polyglot_surge.desc: Push all language subject ranks forward by 2 virtual hours each.

memetic_transfer.name: MEMETIC TRANSFER
memetic_transfer.desc: For 24h: Gc and Vm gains also mirror as Gf gains at 50% rate.

war_cry.name: WAR CRY
war_cry.desc: Reduce boss HP by 10% and stun boss for 1h.

tactical_retreat.name: TACTICAL RETREAT
tactical_retreat.desc: Reset boss encounter, gain 25% max mana back.

sharp_focus.name: Sharp Focus
sharp_focus.desc: Sessions with Focus 8+ give +10% bonus Rank XP

flow_state.name: Flow State
flow_state.desc: First session each day gives 1.5× Rank XP

godmind.name: GODMIND
godmind.desc: IQ score contributes 0.5× to Rank XP per session

iron_conditioning.name: Iron Conditioning
iron_conditioning.desc: Exercise and Running give +15% Rank XP

pain_threshold.name: Pain Threshold
pain_threshold.desc: Missed daily HP loss reduced by 25%

market_knowledge.name: Market Knowledge
market_knowledge.desc: Selling items gives 60% of buy price

golden_mind.name: GOLDEN MIND
golden_mind.desc: Sessions over 2h give a guaranteed loot drop

aura_of_focus.name: Aura of Focus
aura_of_focus.desc: Allies gain +10% to their stat bonuses

transcendent_will.name: Transcendent Will
transcendent_will.desc: Rival advancement speed reduced by 10% permanently

void_clarity.name: VOID CLARITY
void_clarity.desc: Once per week: use any active skill at 0 mana cost

polymath.name: Polymath
polymath.desc: Logging 3+ subjects in one day gives +20 bonus XP

cross_training.name: Cross-Training
cross_training.desc: Language sessions give 30% of hours to Humanities ranks

encyclopedia.name: Encyclopedia
encyclopedia.desc: Gc gains increased by 20% from all sources

living_library.name: Living Library
living_library.desc: Reading/Philosophy sessions advance you faster vs rival

omniscience.name: OMNISCIENCE
omniscience.desc: All 5 metrics gain +0.3 flat on each achievement unlock

master.name: Master
master.desc: Reach B rank in any subject

grandmaster.name: Grandmaster
grandmaster.desc: Reach SSS rank in any subject

bloodwork.name: BLOODWORK
bloodwork.desc: Science sessions give +20% Rank XP. Other subjects give -5%.

monks_path.name: MONK'S PATH
monks_path.desc: Prayer/Meditation +40% Rank XP. Streak log gives +2 XP instead of +1.

iron_routine.name: IRON ROUTINE
iron_routine.desc: Exercise/Running +25% Rank XP. Miss a daily → lose bonus for 24h.

lexicon.name: LEXICON
lexicon.desc: Language sessions +20% Rank XP. +0.01 Gc per session.

night_owl.name: NIGHT OWL
night_owl.desc: Sessions after 21:00 give +30% Rank XP. Before 09:00: -10%.

early_riser.name: EARLY RISER
early_riser.desc: Sessions before 09:00 give +30% Rank XP. After 21:00: -10%.

tunnel_vision.name: TUNNEL VISION
tunnel_vision.desc: Log ONLY one subject/day: +50% Rank XP. Log 2+: bonus lost.

loan_shark.name: LOAN SHARK
loan_shark.desc: +40% Gold from tasks. Every midnight: lose 30G.

miser.name: MISER
miser.desc: Cannot spend Gold on shop items. Each 24h without spending: +5 Rank XP.

tithe.name: TITHE
tithe.desc: Each task: pay 3G or lose 5 HP. But +15% Rank XP from all tasks.

ascetic_loop.name: ASCETIC LOOP
ascetic_loop.desc: Streak gives Rank XP: streak×0.2 per day. Break streak: lose all bonus XP.

double_nothing.name: DOUBLE OR NOTHING
double_nothing.desc: Streak milestone rewards doubled. Miss 2 days in a row: streak resets to 0.

momentum.name: MOMENTUM
momentum.desc: Each day with 1h+ logged: +2% Rank XP, stacks to +20%. Miss: resets.

diversity_lock.name: DIVERSITY LOCK
diversity_lock.desc: Cannot log same subject two sessions in a row. Reward: +20% Rank XP for 30d.

silence.name: SILENCE
silence.desc: All skills disabled 48h. After: all cooldowns → 0.

ironman.name: IRONMAN
ironman.desc: HP hits 0 → forced prestige. In return: all Rank XP +15% forever.

glass_cannon.name: GLASS CANNON
glass_cannon.desc: Rank XP +25%. HP loss from misses +60%.

zero_hour.name: ZERO HOUR
zero_hour.desc: No Gold earned for 7 days. After: get back 3× everything you would've earned.

catalyst.name: CATALYST
catalyst.desc: Each OTHER active mutator gives +8% Rank XP. Alone: useless.

echo.name: ECHO
echo.desc: Last subject logged gives double metric gains on NEXT session (diff subject).

mirror.name: MIRROR
mirror.desc: Same domain task as last session: +15% boss damage.

resonance.name: RESONANCE
resonance.desc: If 2+ active mutators share a category: +10% to ALL their effects.

gambler.name: GAMBLER
gambler.desc: Each task: 20% chance double rewards, 20% chance 0 rewards, 60% normal.

phantom_load.name: PHANTOM LOAD
phantom_load.desc: Yesterday's hours count as +30% today for Rank XP calculation.

cursed_clock.name: CURSED CLOCK
cursed_clock.desc: Every idle hour (8:00–22:00): lose 2G. But +1 Rank XP per logged hour.

deja_vu.name: DÉJÀ VU
deja_vu.desc: Same subject 3 days in a row: 3rd session +50% Rank XP. 4th day: normal.

volatile.name: VOLATILE
volatile.desc: First task each day: +100% rewards. Last (5+ tasks): +50%. Between: -10%.

weight_of_history.name: WEIGHT OF HISTORY
weight_of_history.desc: Lifetime hours / 100 = permanent bonus % Rank XP. At 500h: +5%. At 1000h: +10%.
